subject: A humanoid figure pinned to the ground by multiple glowing hedron shards converging on them from all directions
description: A humanoid figure lies on their back in grass, arms and legs spread, as multiple geometric crystal shards — hedrons, the iconic Zendikar stones covered in angular rune-like engravings — converge on the figure from multiple angles. Each shard glows blue-white at its edges and appears to have impacted or restrained the figure. The figure's face is visible, mouth open in an expression of pain or shock. The setting is grassy terrain. The image reads as confinement or binding magic — the figure is captured, not killed.
foreground: humanoid figure pinned by multiple glowing hedron shards on grassy ground
emotion: pain, shock, helplessness — the bound figure
